questions.context_sentence: He spent about twenty-one hours in space.

questions.context_sentence: He spent about twenty-one hours in space.

questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: In October 2003, my father flew into space in Shenzhou V.

questions.context_sentence: He also made a video in space.

questions.context_sentence: Helen Keller was born in the US in 1880.

questions.context_sentence: She drew letters in Helen's hand and taught her to spell.

questions.context_sentence: She drew letters in Helen's hand and taught her to spell.
questions.hint: s+pell(皮)，拼写单词要脱掉外皮看核心。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: She wrote a book about herself and travelled all over the world.
questions.hint: her(她)+self(自己)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: She wrote a book about ____ and travelled all over the world.

questions.context_sentence: She wrote a book about herself and travelled all over the world.
questions.hint: all(全部)+over(结束/上方)，遍及所有地方。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Helen lived to be eighty-seven.
questions.hint: i在这个词里发短音/ɪ/，活着就是一种力量。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: She is a role model for blind people, and also for you and me.
questions.hint: role(角色)+model(模型)，角色的模范。

questions.context_sentence: My father, Yang Liwei, is a taikonaut, and he is very famous.

questions.context_sentence: As a baby, she became blind and deaf.
questions.hint: b+line(线)+d，眼睛里只有黑线。
